case_title: MAZEN HASSAN VS. SULTAN AWWAD ALKHRAISAT

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASSAN, MAZEN AS TO DEFENDANT ALKHRAISAT, SULTAN AWWAD , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WORLD SOCCER CAFE LLC AND DBA SOCCER CAFE.COM OEX HEARING SET FOR SEP-25-2014 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514
POS OF APPLICATION AND OEX FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASSAN, MAZEN

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT SULTAN AWWAD ALKHRAISAT ON SEP-25-2014 CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2014 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 ON ORDER OF THE COURT. PLAINTIFF AND JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAZEN HASSAN APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. RESPONDENT AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR SULTAN AWWAD ALKHRAISAT APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SWORN AND EXAMINED BY THE COURT. COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT DEBTOR SULTAN AWWAD ALKHRAISAT TO RETUR TO THE COURTROOM ON NOV. 13, 2014. NO FURTHER NOTICE IS REQUIRED. COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS REQUESTED BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ON ORDER OF THE COURT DOCUMENTS TO BE PRODUCED BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON NOV. 4, 2014. ADDRESS FOR DOCUMENTS TO BE DELIVERED AT 230 OAK STREET, #31 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS REGARDING BANKRUPTCY FILED BY DEFENDANT ALKHRAISAT, SULTAN AWWAD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HASSAN, MAZEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALKHRAISAT, SULTAN AWWAD , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WORLD SOCCER CAFE LLC AND DBA SOCCER CAFE.COM $22,719.78 PRINCIPAL, $148.02 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,237.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASSAN, MAZEN AS TO DEFENDANT ALKHRAISAT, SULTAN AWWAD , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WORLD SOCCER CAFE LLC AND DBA SOCCER CAFE.COM JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT SULTAN AWWAD ALKHRAISAT ON NOV-13-2014 CONTINUED TO DEC-16-2014 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 ON ORDER OF THE COURT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAZEN HASSAN APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SULTAN AWWAD ALKHRAISAT SWORN AND EXAMINED. MR. ALKHRAISAT ORDERED BY THE COURT TO RETURN TO THE COURTROOM. NO FURTHER NOTICE IS REQUIRED. MR. ALKHARAISAT ORDERED TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTATION REQUESTED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ON OR BEFORE THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS OF DECEMBER 10, 2014. MR. ALKHRAISAT TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH INFORMATION RE FILING OF BANKRUPTCY. DOCUMENTS TO BE DELIVERED TO 230 OAK STREET, #31, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT SULTAN AWWAD ALKHRAISAT ON DEC-16-2014 CONTINUED TO FEB-03-2015 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 ON ORDER OF THE COURT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAZEN HASSAN APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SULTAN AWWAD ALKHRAISAT APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. MR. ALKHRAISAT WAS ORDERED BY THE COURT TO RETURN TO THE COURTROOM ON FEB. 3, 2015 WITHOUT ANY FURTHER NOTICE. MR. ALKHRAISAT TO FILE A NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY IN THIS COURT'S JURISDICTION. MR. ALKHRAISAT PROVIDED THE COURT WITH A COPY OF A FILING IN THE UNITED STATES BANKRUPTCY COURT. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT SULTAN AWWAD ALKHRAISAT, ON FEB-03-2015 OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR. NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
